extension.description: CanMV K230 development in Visual Studio Code: connect, run scripts, preview frames, manage files, and use the board terminal.
canmv.command.runOnK230: CanMV: Run Active File on K230
canmv.configuration.title: CanMV
canmv.configuration.serialPath.descripti: Serial device path. Leave empty to auto-detect CanMV devices by USB VID:PID 1209:abd1. Set manually to override: e.g., /dev/ttyACM0
canmv.configuration.baudRate.description: Serial baud rate (default: 12M for K230 USB CDC). Only used when serialPath is manually set.
canmv.configuration.backendPath.descript: Path to a CanMV backend executable. Leave empty to use the backend bundled with the extension.
canmv.configuration.stubsAutoDownload.de: Automatically download K230 stubs and examples on board connect
